name: Wen Yang (Ciqian)
page_title: Wen Yang (Ciqian) 文鴦 (次騫) [Wei, Zhuge Dan, Jin] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	There is no historical mention of Wen Yang’s so-called ’famous whip of steel.’
	Wen Yang, upon hearing of his father’s death, did not actually start causing havoc in Shou Chun.

full_text:
Wen Yang (Ciqian) 文鴦 (次騫)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wen Yang (文鴦), styledCiqian (次騫). Wen Qin’s son. Fought Sima Shi’s army. Later pledged loyalty to Zhuge Dan. Wen Yang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom, Zhuge Dan, and the Jin Dynasty.
